**Quick Checks (please try those before creating an issue)**

- [ ] Checked the [Troubleshooting Tool](https://itemdb.com.br/tools/troubleshooting)
- [ ] Tried disabling all other userscripts
- [ ] Tried to reinstall Tampermonkey

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Device Info (please complete the following information):**
 - OS: [e.g. iOS]
 - Browser [e.g. chrome, safari]
 - Version [e.g. 22]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
